title: selliguea subebenipes
intro: Selliguea subebenipes, also known as the Water Fern or Selliguea, is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selliguea subebenipes include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even help manage diabetes due to its antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Selliguea subebenipes is often used in teas, infusions, or topical applications, such as ointments or creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
